zh.Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓
zh.Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton於1305年3月14日出生在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，他的父親Ralph Basset33歲，母親Joan de Grey23歲。他和Alice de Audley至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1343年2月25日在他的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓
zh-hans.Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton于1305年3月14日出生在英国斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特时，他的父亲Ralph Basset33岁，母亲Joan de Grey23岁。他和Alice de Audley至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1343年2月25日在他的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton was born on 14 March 1305, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, his father, Ralph Basset, was 33 and his mother, Joan de Grey, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Alice de Audley. He died on 25 February 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton est né le 14 mars 1305, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Basset, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan de Grey, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de Audley. Il est décédé le 25 février 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton am 14. März 1305 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Basset 33 und seine Mutter Joan de Grey 23. Er hatte mit Alice de Audley mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Februar 1343 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton è nato il il 14 marzo 1305 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Basset, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Grey, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Alice de Audley. Morì il 25 febbraio 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ウエルドン
ja.Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセット
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Draytonが1305年3月14日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Ralph Bassetは33歳，母Joan de Greyは23歳であった。彼はAlice de Audleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1343年2月25日に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton(이)가 1305년 3월 14일 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Basset(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Grey(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Alice de Audley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 2월 25일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.14 March 1305–25 February 1343: 1305 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 14–1343 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 25

pt.14 March 1305–25 February 1343: 14 de março de 1305–25 de fevereiro de 1343
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton nasceu em 14 de março de 1305, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Basset, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Grey, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Alice de Audley. Ele faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton родился 14 марта 1305 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Basset было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Grey, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Alice de Audley. Он умер 25 февраля 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

es.14 March 1305–25 February 1343: 14 de marzo de 1305–25 de febrero de 1343
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton nació el 14 de marzo de 1305, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Basset, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan de Grey, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Alice de Audley. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1343, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
